category_sources: SourceForge official project page categorizes AutoMySQLBackup under Backup and describes daily, weekly, and monthly MySQL database backups.
source_facts.description says AutoMySQLBackup automates MySQL backups.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page title is AutoMySQLBackup.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge project page and is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project page and supplied source_facts expose downloads/project information but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge page describes database backup scheduling, compression/encryption, rotation, and incremental backups.
